name: AFFICH_m
description: Display block for showing signal values during simulation
xmlExample:
<AfficheBlock id="b1" parent="0:2:0" interfaceFunctionName="AFFICH_m" blockType="c" simulationFunctionName="affich2" simulationFunctionType="C_OR_FORTRAN" style="AFFICH_m" dependsOnU="1" dependsOnT="0">
    <ScilabString as="exprs" height="7" width="1">
        <data line="0" column="0" value="[1,1]" />
        <data line="1" column="0" value="1" />
        <data line="2" column="0" value="1" />
        <data line="3" column="0" value="1" />
        <data line="4" column="0" value="5" />
        <data line="5" column="0" value="1" />
        <data line="6" column="0" value="0" />
    </ScilabString>
    <ScilabDouble as="realParameters" height="0" width="0" />
    <ScilabInteger as="integerParameters" height="1" width="7" intPrecision="sci_int32">
        <data line="0" column="0" value="1" />
        <data line="0" column="1" value="1" />
        <data line="0" column="2" value="1" />
        <data line="0" column="3" value="1000" />
        <data line="0" column="4" value="5" />
        <data line="0" column="5" value="1" />
        <data line="0" column="6" value="1" />
    </ScilabInteger>
    <Array as="objectsParameters" scilabClass="ScilabList" />
    <ScilabInteger as="nbZerosCrossing" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32">
        <data line="0" column="0" value="0" />
    </ScilabInteger>
    <ScilabInteger as="nmode" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32">
        <data line="0" column="0" value="0" />
    </ScilabInteger>
    <ScilabDouble as="state" height="0" width="0" />
    <ScilabDouble as="dState" height="1" width="7">
        <data line="0" column="0" realPart="-1.0" />
        <data line="0" column="1" realPart="0.0" />
        <data line="0" column="2" realPart="0.0" />
        <data line="0" column="3" realPart="1.0" />
        <data line="0" column="4" realPart="1.0" />
        <data line="0" column="5" realPart="0.0" />
        <data line="0" column="6" realPart="0.0" />
    </ScilabDouble>
    <Array as="oDState" scilabClass="ScilabList" />
    <Array as="equations" scilabClass="ScilabList" />
    <mxGeometry as="geometry" x="200.0" y="200.0" width="60.0" height="40.0" />
</AfficheBlock>
anomalies: Has ControlPort for event trigger - NOT a clock input but a refresh trigger
dState array stores display history - unique among blocks
Display/scope block - consumes simulation data with no outputs
Width is 60 (1.5x standard) to accommodate display area
criticalRules: Has ControlPort for event trigger (not clock)
